response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience and technical versatility, particularly in full-stack development, but his seniority and focus on advanced topics (e.g., AI agents, high-performance systems) may overshoot the junior/mid-level role. His alignment with TypeScript, React, and PostgreSQL is strong, but the role's emphasis on renewable energy/construction tech and on-site presence may require further exploration.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple roles.
Strong open-source contributions and hands-on experience with Kubernetes and AWS-like environments.
Demonstrated ability to learn quickly and collaborate in team settings (e.g., TDD, pairing, CI/CD).
concerns: Senior-level experience may misalign with the junior/mid-level role's expectations.
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL or REST API design in recent work.
Work history is primarily remote/Brazil-based, with unclear availability for high on-site presence in Germany.
